titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 565
GA 565
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Lacuna extent changed in 11.48 by David Parker.
Existing P379r deleted and P379ar changed to P379r by Rachel Kevern.
Corrector tags removed and lac part word tag added at 17.12 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Corrector tag and partial word corrected in 17.12 by David Parker and Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 18.25 corrected by David Parker.
Word break at 14.2 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α 565 Level 1 ΤranscriptionΤranscribed by: ΑSWΤranscription begun: 08.01.09Τranscription finished: 09.01.09Last modified: 22.07.09Οnly text visible on the microfilm has been checked by transcription collationCorrected after visit to St Ρetersburg Νational Library: Μay 2008 F 389 αβ Replacement page. See supplement fileCorrected by collation with 1 and 1582: 12.02.08Τag character length reduced 24.02.09C2: Correction made by the hand that added the replacement pagesLacuna: Jn. 11.26 - 48 and 13.2 - 23.See supplement fileAdjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013

ab.note: δων: the microlfilm is not readable at this point, Swanson records ιδων. Μy St Ρetersburg notes record δων
Byz ed records as correction from μενει

Note: το περι της μοιχαλιδος κεφαλαιον εν τω κατα ιωαννη(ν) ευαγγελιω ως εν τοις {[dub]νυν{[\dub] αντιγραφοις μη κειμενον {[dub]παρα{[\dub]λειψα κατα τον τοπο(ν) κειται δε ου {[ill]7{[\ill] ολιγα της αρχης του πς̅ κεφαλαιου εξης του ερευν{[dub]ησο(ν){[\dub] και ιδε οτι προφητη{[dub]ς{[\dub] {[ill]4-5{[\ill] γαλιλαιας ουκ εγειρεται
